name: Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite
metaDescription: Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite (Google), released 2025-06-17 — part of the Gemini Flash-Lite line. Fastest/cheapest 2.5 model with optional toggleable reasoning; later…
overview: Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite is a large language model from Google, part of the Gemini Flash-Lite line. Released 2025-06-17. Google's fastest and lowest-cost Gemini tier, optimized for intelligence per dollar.
What's notable in this version: Fastest/cheapest 2.5 model with optional toggleable reasoning; later GA. Updated 09-2025 preview cut output tokens ~50%.
